uk: 🕁 Блаженного священномученика Миколая Чарнецького і двадцяти чотирьох співмучеників; блаженного священномученика Омеляна Ковча
Преподобного отця нашого Сампсона, приятеля подорожніх й убогих
saints.en: Blessed Hieromartyr Mykola Charnetsky and Twenty-Four Fellow Martyrs; Blessed Hieromartyr Omelian Kovch. Ven. Sampson the Hospitable

rubrics:
Вечірня: «Блажен муж». На «Господи, взиваю» - 8 стихир блаженних мчч., Сл.: мчч., І нині: богородичний-догмат 1-го гласу. Вхід. Прокімен дня і три читання мчч.: Іс. 43, 9-14; Муд. 3, 1-9; Муд. 5, 15-23; 6, 1-3. Литія мчч. Стиховня мчч. По благословенні хлібів тропар «Богородице Діво» (2) і мчч. (1). Відпуст великий з помин. мчч.
Утреня: по «Бог Господь» тропар мчч. (2), Сл., І нині: богород. з недільних, за гласом тропаря мчч. Катизми черг., сідальні мчч. Полієлей, Величання, мала єктенія та сідал. мчч. Степенна 4-го гласу: «Від юності моєї» і прокімен мчч. Єв. Лк. 106 зач.; 21,12-19. Пс. 50 стихира мчч. Канон мчч. Катавасія «Відкрию уста мої». По 3-ій – сідал. мчч.; по 6-ій – конд.-ікос мчч.; по 9-ій – світил. мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. Хвалитніх стихир 6 мчч., Сл.: мчч., І нині: богород. По вел. славослов'ї – тропар мчч., Сл., І нині: богород. з недільних, за гласом тропаря мчч. Відпуст великий з помин. мчч.
Часи: на всіх – тропар і кондак мчч.
Літургія: антифони повсякденні. Вся Служба – свщмчч. Свщнмчч.: Ап. – Еф. 233 зач., 6,10-17. Єв. - Мт. 36 зач.; 10, 16-22.

troparion_en.text: Blessed Ukrainian Martyrs,* you did not break the integrity of the Body of Christ,* in giving your bodies to tribulations:* you did not give way to the flattery of the enemy nor deny the Petrine unity.* Your earthly homeland Ukraine beseeches you* together with the whole Universal Church, singing with ancient song:* Holy Martyrs, you gloriously suffered and were crowned;* So pray to the Lord to have mercy on our souls.

kontakion_en.text: Invincible martyrs crowed with victory,* we in the Church you saved* sing songs of thanksgiving to you,* written on the scrolls of our hearts.* And you whose names are written in the Book of the living God,* protect our Church with Life,* that we may cry out: Rejoice you who belong to Heaven!

matched_oca_saint: Saint Sampson the Hospitable of Constantinople

oca_saints.name: Saint Sampson the Hospitable of Constantinople

troparion.text: Through your patience, your unceasing prayer, your love for the poor and the help you gave to them,  /  you became worthy of your reward, O holy Sampson.  / Intercede with Christ God that He may save our souls.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “As the first-fruits of nature...” – Kontakion for All Saints)
We honor your relics, for you are an excellent physician and powerful intercessor; /  as we gather to praise you with psalms and hymns, divinely-wise and Venerable Sampson,  /  we glorify Christ, who granted you the grace of healing.

troparion.text:
(For reading in the cell)
You indicated the way to salvation through Christ,  /  rejecting the Hagarene wickedness of your family,  / loving Christ God with all your heart,  / you regarded boyar honors as nothing, / you chose to live an eremitic life, / with the desert-dweller Nephon you served the Lord,  / glorifying the Holy Trinity with prayers and labors in the wilderness, you were revealed as a branch of the good root,  /  bringing forth good fruit to the Lord.  / O Father Serapion,  /  pray unceasingly for all of us.

kontakion.text: You increased the grace given to you by God a hundredfold, /  establishing a northern abode in the wilderness, / and with love you gathered and nourished a multitude of others;  /  you were not wounded by the labors and reproaches of the brethren,  / but were revealed as an image of meekness, patience, and humility;  / therefore, Venerable Father Serapion, /  entreat the Lord to grant these grace-filled gifts to our souls.

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father George, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Finding of the relics of Venerable Ambrose of Optina

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Ambrose, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Martin, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

oca_saints.name: Hieromartyr Kirion II, Catholicos-Patriarch of All Georgia

troparion.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, you defended the Faith, / even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Kirion, entreat Christ God to save our souls.
